title: Welcome to Cadence Architect
titleContent: Cadence Architect is a chord progression generator built to help with one of the hardest parts of writing music: getting started. Instead of staring at a blank project, you can generate a progression, hear it back, and use it as a starting point for whatever you want to build next.
reasonAnswer: I made this because music and software are two things I care about, and this project gave me a way to bring them together into something useful. Sometimes you do not need a full song idea. You just need a progression that gives you somewhere to begin.
